Liedtext

Ich weiß, die Bar schließt um 23 Uhr.
Ich hoffe, du trinkst dein Bier nie aus.
Du kennst den Text von „Just Like Heaven“ auswendig.
Und ich weiß, warum er ihn geschrieben hat.
Jetzt, wo du direkt vor mir stehst.

Ohh.
Eines Nachts langweilte ich mich im Bett.
Und habe dich im Internet gestalkt.
Es ist weibliche Intuition.
Denn ich hatte immer die Vision, wie wir so dastehen.
Gedrängt in der Schlange vor dem Badezimmer.
Du siehst aus wie ein Engel an den Wänden von Versailles
So lebendig habe ich mich noch nie gefühlt
Aber küss mich und ich falle tot um

Und mir ist so übel
Linker Haken, rechter Schlag in den Magen
Du bist so ein hübscher Junge
Ich bin paranoid, dass ich dich mir nur eingebildet habe
Ja, ich würde mich freuen, wenn du mich nach Hause begleiten würdest
Wenn du mir versprichst, dass wir ganz langsam gehen können
Denn ich habe Kaugummi
Und noch so vieles, was ich gerne wissen würde
Warst du zum Beispiel schon mal in Japan?
Oder bist du schon mal mit dem Eurostar nach Frankreich gefahren?

Ich hab dir die ganze Nacht Andeutungen gemacht
Dass ich es lieben würde, wenn du meine Hand halten würdest, verdammt nochmal
Und dann könnten wir vielleicht rummachen
Kleider aus und zu Boden fallen
Lass uns zusammen sein
Lass uns ausgehen
Und der ganzen Welt erzählen, wie

en.title: Olivia Rodrigo - drop dead (Official Music Video)
en.description:
"drop dead" out now: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/dropdead

Presave 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love' out on June 12th: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/girlsoinlove
Shop the collection: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/store


Directed by Petra Collins
Shot in The Palace of Versailles

Lyrics

I know that the bar closes at 11
I hope you never finish that beer
You know all the words to “Just Like Heaven”
And I know why he wrote them
Now that you’re standing right here

Ohh
One night I was bored in bed
And stalked you on the internet
It’s feminine intuition
‘Cuz I always had a vision of us standing like this
All pressed up in the bathroom line
You’re looking like an angel on the walls of Versailles
The most alive I’ve ever been
But kiss me and I might drop dead

And I feel like I might throw up
Left hook, right punch to the gut
You’re so so pretty boy
I’m paranoid I made you up
Yeah I’d love it if you walked me home
If you promised we could go real slow
‘Cuz I got chewing gum
And a bunch of stuff I’d like to know
Like, have you ever been to Japan?
Or taken that Eurostar to France?
I’ve been dropping hints all night
That I’d love it if you held my hand, goddamn
And then maybe we could make-makeout
Clothes off and fall to the ground
Let’s go steady
Let’s go out
And tell the whole damn world how

One night I was bored in bed
And stalked you on the internet
It’s feminine intuition
‘Cuz I always had a vision of us standing like this
All pressed up in the bathroom line
You’re looking like an angel on the walls of Versailles
The most alive I’ve ever been
But kiss me and I might

Pisces and a Gemini
But I think we might go really nice together
If you let me stay the night
Well I think I might just have to stay forever

If you let me stay the night
Well I think I might just have to stay forever

Ohh

‘Cuz I always had a vision of us standing like this

You’re looking like an angel on the walls of Versailles

en.title: A GAME WHERE TREES RAGE BAIT YOU.. [Trees Hate You]
en.description:
Wassup Gamers,

Today I will be playing a new rage game. Welcome to Trees Hate You. This is a new game where we have to hike through a wonderful forest. But be careful because you don't what is hiding in these trees and what is wrong with these trees. Never trust the trees.

Thumbnail Inspiration : @KeemSama  

Follow Me On EVERYWHERE! *Not on streets please :')*

snippet.title: Jagannath Chaka Nain Lilachal Vare | Tu Na Sambhale Toh Hume Kaun Sambhale | Jagannath Bhajan 2026
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhakti Divine Beats 🙏

Jagannath Chaka Nain Lilachal Vare | Tu Na Sambhale Toh Hume Kaun Sambhale | Jagannath Bhajan 2026 

◆Song : Jagannath Chaka Nain Lilachal Vare (जगन्नाथ चक्का नैन नीलाचल)
◆Singer : Rajesh Chandra
◆Music : Arun Vir
◆Lyrics : Traditional

◆Hindi Lyrics:

जग्गनाथ जग्गनाथ चक्का नैंन चक्का नैंन,
नीलाचल वारे तूं ना सम्भालें तो हमें कौंन सम्भालें
जग्गनाथ....

1.मेरी नाव सिर्फ एक तेरे सहारे,
तूं ना सम्भालें तो हमें कौंन सम्भालें
जग्गनाथ जग्गनाथ चक्का नैंन चक्का नैंन,
नीलाचल वारे तूं ना सम्भालें तो हमें कौंन सम्भालें
जग्गनाथ....

2.तुझे छोड़ जाऊं मैं अब किस किसके द्वारे,
तूं ना सम्भालें तो हमें कौंन सम्भालें
जग्गनाथ जग्गनाथ चक्का नैंन चक्का नैंन,
नीलाचल वारे तूं ना सम्भालें तो हमें कौंन सम्भालें
जग्गनाथ....

3.जग्गनाथ स्वामी मेरे नैंन के तारे,
मेरे सार काज स्वामी आप सवारें
जग्गनाथ जग्गनाथ चक्का नैंन चक्का नैंन,
नीलाचल वारे तूं ना सम्भालें तो हमें कौंन सम्भालें
जग्गनाथ...

◆English Lyrics:

{ Jagannath Chaka Nain, Lilachal Vare...
Tu Na Sambhale Toh Hume Kaun Sambhale…
Meri Naiyya Hai Ab Tere Hawale… }

◆Label  : Digiline Media

This channel is devoted to spreading divine love through bhajans, kirtans, mantras, and spiritual music. Our mission is to fill your heart with peace, faith, and positive vibrations.

#Jagannathchakanainlilachalvare #jagannathchakanayana #Jagannathchakanain #Jagannathbhajan #Jagannathyatra

snippet.title: मरता मरता वाचवलं येडमाईन | Marata Marata Vachaval Yedamain | rushabh hatkar | Yedamay Sad song
snippet.description:
सरकार प्रोडक्शन प्रेझेंट......

8999139151 ✨
#yedamai  #yedamai #aambabai #yedamai_song  #yedamai_new_song #sad #sadsong #sadsongyedamai


सरकार प्रोडक्शन चैनल वरती आपलं मनापासून सहर्ष  स्वागत... 🙏🙏
....
मागील सॉंग ला जसा प्रतिसाद दिला तसा या पण सॉंग ला द्याल अशी अपेक्षा करतो 🙏🙏

ऋषभ हाटकर.....💯✨

मित्रांनो ऋषभ हाटकर यांच्या आवाजात आपल्यासाठी घेऊन आलो आहे SAD SONG तरी लवकर पूर्ण सॉंग पाहून चायनल  सबस्क्राईब करा आणि सहकार्य करा...,,🙏🙏


@..निर्माता - उमेश डोके पाटील..@

@..गीत - मरता मरता वाचवलं येडामाईन.@

@..गायक - ऋषभ हाटकर..@

@..गीत- सनी पाटोळे ..@

@.. संगीत- सनी पाटोळे..@



#...व्हिडिओ पाहून झाल्यावर नक्की कमेंट करून सांगा कसा वाटला आणि सबस्क्राईब करायला विसरू नका🙏... असेल नवनवीन व्हिडिओ पाहायला भेटतील आनी नव नविन कलाकारांना संधी दिली जाईल 🙏चैनल नवीन आहे सहकार्य करा सबस्क्राईब आणि बेल आयकॉन दाबायला विसरू नका.......🙏🙏

snippet.title: Akshaya Trutiya Kahani | ଅକ୍ଷୟ ତୃତୀୟା କାହାଣୀ | Namita Agrawal
snippet.description:
ଓଡ଼ିଆ ପରମ୍ପରାରେ ଅକ୍ଷୟ ତୃତୀୟା ହେଉଛି ଏକ ଅତ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଶୁଭ ଓ ପବିତ୍ର ଦିନ। ଏହି ଦିନଠାରୁ ହିଁ ମହାପ୍ରଭୁଙ୍କ ବିଶ୍ଵପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ରଥଯାତ୍ରା ପାଇଁ ରଥ ନିର୍ମାଣର ଅନୁକୂଳ ହୋଇଥାଏ ଏବଂ ଚାଷୀ ଭାଇ ନିଜ କ୍ଷେତରେ ପ୍ରଥମ ବିହନ ବୁଣିଥାଏ। ଆପଣଙ୍କ ପ୍ରିୟ ଚ୍ୟାନେଲ୍ ଆପଣଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ନେଇଆସିଛି କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ ନମିତା ଅଗ୍ରୱାଲଙ୍କ ସୁମଧୁର ସ୍ୱରରେ "ଅକ୍ଷୟ ତୃତୀୟା କାହାଣୀ" ଓ ଏହାର ମାହାତ୍ମ୍ୟ।

#AkshayaTrutiya #AkshayaTrutiya2026 #NamitaAgrawal #sidharthmusic #OdiaFestival #AkshayaTrutiyaKahani #OdiaPurana #JagannathCulture #RathAnukula #ChandanYatra #OdiaDevotional #NamitaAgrawalBhajan

snippet.title: Insta Keeda |  इंस्टा कीड़ा | Official Adivasi Video | Kaushik Vasava & Pradnya Jadhav #adivasisong
snippet.description:
🎬 Jay Johar, Jay Yaha Mogi Mata
The video opens with vibrant Adivasi village visuals, setting a lively cultural tone. The lead characters are introduced in a natural, festive environment, blending tradition with a modern “Insta” vibe.

As the song begins, energetic dance sequences unfold in colorful outdoor locations, featuring group choreography and expressive movements. Close-up shots capture emotions and chemistry between the lead artists, while wide cinematic frames highlight the beauty of the surroundings.

The concept revolves around today’s social media influence (“Insta Keeda”) mixed with Adivasi lifestyle, showing fun, love, and youthful energy. Dynamic camera movements, slow-motion shots, and stylish cuts enhance the visual appeal.

The video concludes with a high-energy group performance, leaving a strong cultural and entertaining impact.

Director: Pawan Bhosle (PB)
Producer: Pawan Bhosle (PB)
Choreography: Sandy Pradhan
Singers: Kaushik Vasava & Pradnya Jadhav
Lyrics: Vishal Shewale
Recording: Ritesh Kirade (RK)
DOP: Pawan Bhosle (PB) 7566340698
Cinematography: PS Bhosle
Cameramen: Aakesh Thakur & Jiten Khedkar
DI & Color Edit: Pawan Bhosle
Featuring: Nanu Tadvi, Raja Jadhav (RJD) & Saru Vasava
BGM Boys:
Nix Axi, Gopal Dancer, Pradeep Roshan Brahamne & Sagar
BGM Girls:
Axita, Sonu, Piyu & Poonam

*****Special Thanks***

Dharasing Brahmnae ( Sarpnch ) 
Brahmnae Femily ( Falati )
Onkar Khedkar Rahul barde Ravin bhosle

Location : Falati and Raikhed Mankui

snippet.title: Appa Laptop❌ Gaming Laptop✅ - Top Games on அப்பா Laptop 🎮
snippet.description:
In this video, PC Doc Nandha tests a 2026 government-provided Acer laptop by running a wide range of games, from indie titles to esports games. Since the laptop does not have a dedicated GPU, we explore how far it can go with its built-in hardware. We also break down the full specifications, including our 2TB SSD upgrade used for game installations. Finally, we analyze the FPS performance across different games to show what this laptop is realistically capable of, highlighting the true gap between expectation and reality from smooth gameplay to complete breakdown.
